data.description:
The plan-review Pass-1 thread fan-out loses the active gate session, so every agentic finder call dispatched to a worker thread fails before any LLM call and its findings are dropped ŌĆö the agentic (tool-using) review tier is silently dead in the fan-out while the gate still returns PASS.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Run `rebar review-plan <epic-with-children>` (the gate wraps the run in a `gate_session()` on the main thread).
2. Observe stderr: `WARNING rebar.llm.plan_review.pass1: container bin [...] FAILED in 0.0s (RuntimeError)` on every run.
3. The container bin "fails" in 0.0s (before any LLM call); the agentic Pass-1 chunks fail the same way but are swallowed silently by `sizing.pass1_with_ladder` (`return []`).

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: the agentic container/chunk finders run inside the gate session and produce findings.
- Actual: `assert_gated("agentic filesystem tools")` (runner.py:204, pre-LLM) raises `RuntimeError` in the worker because `_in_gate_session` (a `contextvars.ContextVar`) is NOT inherited by raw `ThreadPoolExecutor` threads (inherited by asyncio tasks only ŌĆö documented in config.py). Findings are dropped; the gate degrades to single_turn + deterministic coverage and still returns PASS.

## Root Cause
`pass1.py` submits agentic `runner.run` work to a raw `ThreadPoolExecutor` at two sites (`_run_container` and `run_pass1`'s chunk pool) without propagating the calling thread's context. Proven by a no-LLM experiment + a RED test reproducing the exact warning.

## Fix
`_submit_ctx(ex, fn, *args)` submitting `ex.submit(contextvars.copy_context().run, fn, *args)` (a FRESH context copy per task) at both fan-out sites. Regression test: `tests/interfaces/store/test_pass1_fanout_gate_session.py`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Agentic Pass-1 finder calls dispatched to fan-out worker threads observe the active gate session (no `assert_gated` RuntimeError).
- [ ] `rebar review-plan` on an epic logs no `container bin ... FAILED ... (RuntimeError)` and the container tier produces findings.
- [ ] Regression test `test_pass1_fanout_gate_session.py` is RED before / GREEN after; existing gate-threading tests still pass.
- [ ] Fix lands via PR to main.
data.title: plan-review Pass-1 thread fan-out loses gate session ŌĆö agentic tier silently dead
